_comment: Direct HTTP MCP config for connecting Claude Code to a running luxd with no mcp-proxy in the path. Point Claude Code's MCP config (project .mcp.json or the plugin's mcpServers block) at luxd's streamable-HTTP endpoint. luxd must be running (lux hub-install, or luxd in a terminal). The url below hard-codes the default port 8430; luxd may bind a different (ephemeral) port, so read the actual port from the hub.port file (HubPaths().read_port(), i.e. ~/.punt-labs/lux/hub.port) and update the url to match. scripts/direct_connection_probe.py resolves the port that way and verifies the endpoint end to end.
